{{Infobox technique
| name = Dark Tide Incantation
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dark Tide Incantation]] is an [[Enforcer technique]] from [[Mercy]]'s second page that carries spiritual and physical weight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dark Tide Incantation]] uses [[madra]] of shadow and water.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dark Tide Incantation]] adds the force of a crashing wave to an attack.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
